body:
Hey Amara, hope you're having a good week — wanted to follow up on our conversation from last week about the [Threshold Ventures](threshold-ventures) portfolio review we were planning for Q1. I've been going through the climate infrastructure cohort and there are two or three companies I'd genuinely love your eyes on, given Halfway's focus in that space. One in particular is doing some interesting work at the intersection of grid optimization and ML inference costs that I think would resonate with you. Would you have 30 minutes sometime in the next two weeks to walk through the deck together? Let me know what works and I'll send a calendar link.

— Mina
